title: fix highlights layout, links display and API rate limiting
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: The news feed gets a glow-up
gist.blurb: We gave the highlights section a fresh coat of paint with clickable links and a cleaner layout. We also taught the frontend how to cache translations, so things load much faster now.
gist.summary: Updated the highlights and news components with a full-width layout, markdown link support, and a new 24-hour local cache for translated content.
gist.impact: The news feed is now easier to read, supports direct links, and loads instantly on return visits.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing a glowing digital bulletin board or reading a neat pixel-art newspaper. Represents the UI layout improvements and news feed updates.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, organizing a glowing digital bulletin board with neat columns and shiny clickable buttons. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
